title: feature request: configurable e2e tests
body:
> /kind feature

Currently, `make localintegration` runs all tests and there is no way to only run specific tests, which can be very helpful during development in order to speed things up. It seems that `ginko` works on a package level, so choosing which tests should be executed seems to imply breaking the general `integration` package of those tests into multiple packages (e.g., `integration/stat`, `integration/images`, etc.). The tests could then be configured via a env variable (e.g., a list of packages to be tested).

What do think about this proposal?

comments.body:
It turns out, this is already working as described here: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/tree/master/test

Thanks a lot, @baude!
